response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack software craftsman with ~15 years of varied engineering experience, but the role requires director-level individual contributor seniority with recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and cloud/AI strategy leadership. The resume shows only recent and limited AI-adjacent work (MCP tooling at re:cinq) without evidence of principal/staff-level strategic influence, advising strategic customers, or building recognized AI products. Title progression peaks at Staff/Senior, not Principal, and there is no advanced degree or deep ML/AI background.
strengths: ~15 years across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure with polyglot fluency
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflows
Founder of an open-source GIS platform showing entrepreneurial and builder mindset
concerns: No demonstrated recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products/platforms at scale
Lacks principal/director-level IC scope: strategy, advising customers, org-wide influence
Limited cloud-platform depth (some AWS CDK) versus the role's cloud strategy focus

key_factors.factor: Principal/director-level IC scope and strategic influence
Builder fluency and entrepreneurial founder experience
